headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tighter) for all H1/H2. Never use Inter. Apply for player names, tournament titles, and major stats.

body.usage: Use for all lists, head-to-head details, and dense data.

medals_badges.classes: relative overflow-hidden backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-full

layout.dashboard: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4). Use bento-box styling for quick stats.
layout.bracket: Horizontal scroll view with connector lines using SVG. Items must have 1px solid borders.
layout.spacing_scale: Use generous padding inside cards (p-6) to avoid text collision.
layout.alignment: Left-align dense stats. Center-align empty states and major trophies.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#F5D76E] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2A2D3A] text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:border-white/50

avatars.style: Hexagonal or sharp-rounded squares (rounded-xl) with metallic borders indicating player rank.

data_tables.style: Cardless, full-width. Alternating row colors (bg-transparent and bg-white/5). 1px border-b on rows.

hero_background.description: Dark moody soccer stadium at night with subtle gold spotlights. Use as hero background overlay for the dashboard or edition landing page with opacity 20%.

gold_medal_badge.description: Elegant 3D gold medal badge on dark background. Use for 'Campeón del FIFA' or 'Rey de Copas' achievements.

interactions.hover_states: All cards must lift (-translate-y-1) with a subtle metallic glow shadow.
interactions.animations: Use Framer Motion/Reanimated for entering screens. Stagger list items in rankings (delay 0.05s per item).
interactions.feedback: Use Haptic feedback for goals registered or match submitted.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. E.g., data-testid='submit-match-button', data-testid='player-card-franco'

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo app. The Tailwind classes provided in these guidelines must be mapped to NativeWind or React Native StyleSheet logic where applicable.
Maintain the Jewel & Luxury archetype. Avoid muddy grays; use the tinted #0A0B0E base.
Ensure 'Unbounded' font is loaded or explicitly mapped in the RN project.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF. Use the specified off-black and off-white.
For the Tournament Brackets (Cups), build a custom visual tree (horizontal ScrollView) with clear connector lines.
Use the provided image URLs exclusively for testing/placeholders.
